title: Quiz: Gradient Methods
description: Test understanding of gradient-based quantum optimization

questions.question: The parameter-shift rule gives:
questions.explanation: Parameter-shift gives exact analytical gradients for rotation gates.

questions.question: Adam optimizer combines:
questions.explanation: Adam combines first moment (momentum) with second moment (adaptive rates).

questions.question: QNG requires computing the Fisher information matrix.
questions.explanation: QNG uses F^{-1} * gradient for geometry-aware updates.

questions.question: Parameter-shift requires how many circuit evaluations per parameter?
questions.explanation: Two evaluations per parameter: theta+pi/2 and theta-pi/2.
